title: PATIKIL 10 Yards x 0.4" Gingham Plaid Ribbon, Yellow and White Gift Wrapping Ribbons for Thanksgiving Bow Wreath Craft Birthday Wedding
features: Color: Yellow, White; Material: Polyester; Size: 10 Yards x 10mm / 360 x 0.4 inch(L*W); Packing List: 1 x Candy Christmas Ribbon Roll

Advantage: This gift ribbon features bold and colorful plaid in traditional holiday colors, adding a festive touch to your decorations and gifts. Made from durable fabric, this candy ribbon is designed to withstand handling and use without fraying or losing shape. The vibrant plaid of this ribbon make it a decorative element, enhancing the visual appeal of any Christmas-themed project or display.

Instruction: The polyester woven edge fall plaid ribbon is flexible and easy to work with, allowing you to easily create beautiful bows and decorations. Autumn color checked ribbon holds its shape well and drapes gracefully on various surfaces.

Application: Check ribbon is great for many projects, including gift wrapping, wreaths, bows, garlands, tree decorations, DIY crafts and more. Checkered ribbon is also suitable for Christmas, New Year, Thanksgiving, birthdays, weddings, anniversary, parties, festivals, home decor or other decoration.
Note: You can cut the length according to your needs and wrap it in a roll for convenient storage.
